notes: Direct pointwise reconstruction: v_tdf = sqrt(v_bar² + r K_τ dτ/dr) with dτ/dr = Δv²/(r K_τ) and Δv² = v_obs² − v_bar². This is an algebraic identity check, not an independent predictive fit. AIC/BIC are not meaningful here; formal model comparison deferred to Phase 3B/3C regularized τ models.
smoothness_warning: 9 gradient spikes on raw Δv²; Phase 3B smoothing/regularization recommended before interpreting τ(r).
